text:
Transport Ticket (, Tsūkō Chiketto) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows the user to have a safe journey out of the game. It's a ticket that allows the player to board a boat that takes them out of the game and teleports them to a port of their choice from a list of 50 available ports.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.266 :: 
Ｇ・Ｉから出るときに必要な券。所長から金で買うか所長を倒すと手に入る。ちなみに無理難題をいくら聞いてもチケットはくれない。
|-
![Eng]
|No.266 :: Transport Ticket 
Good for one trip off of Greed Island. Obtained by bribing the Harbormaster or knocking him out. Otherwise, he gives you infinite quests.
|}

Card Forms

 
Passage_Ticket_(G.I_card).png|2011 Anime ver. Screenshot
Passage Ticket (G.I card) =scan=.png|2011 Anime ver. Scan
 

Trivia

Killua uses this card, in Chapter 146, to leave the island to retake the Hunter Exam.
The card's debuts are:
in the manga, Chapter 146;
in the 1999 anime adaptation, Episode 80;
and, in the 2011 anime adaptation, Episode 65.
In the Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime, the card's name is "Passage Ticket".
The character in the card illustration is the Harbormaster NPC.
